basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Raipur has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Chhattisgarh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. / B.E. degree in (CSE/IT/ECE/Data Science/AI/ML or any other relevant branch) with GATE qualified or B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in CSE/IT/ECE/Data Science/AI/ML or any other relevant branch or MCA/MSc (Computer Science/IT) equivalent from an Institute of National Importance/AICTE-approved University/Institution with minimum 65% marks or 7.0 CGPA (out of 10).
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: B.Tech. / B.E. degree in (CSE/IT/ECE/Data Science/AI/ML or any other relevant branch) with GATE qualified or B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in CSE/IT/ECE/Data Science/AI/ML or any other relevant branch or MCA/MSc (Computer Science/IT) equivalent from an Institute of National Importance/AICTE-approved University/Institution with minimum 65% marks or 7.0 CGPA (out of 10). Candidates with strong knowledge and hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Python Programming will be given preference.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA (18%) = 43,660/- per month
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA (18%) = Rs. 43,660/- per month

selection_process: Application submission via Google Form Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Raipur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Raipur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via the Google Form is 24th July 2026. It is advisable to complete the application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./B.E. degree in relevant branches with GATE qualification, or a B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech., or an MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science/IT with at least 65% marks or 7.0 CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus 18% HRA, totaling Rs. 43,660/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves submitting an application through a Google Form, followed by a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for NIT Raipur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through a Google Form. However, candidates are also required to bring a printed copy of their application and relevant documents to the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to bring the printed application, self-attested copies of DOB certificate, degree/provisional certificate, mark sheets, NET/GATE scorecard, caste certificate, NOC, and other relevant documents. Originals must be presented for verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment for the position of Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 492010.

faq.question: Q10. Does the recruitment mention any preference for specific skills?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with strong knowledge and hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Python Programming will be given preference.
